action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt) begin declare @unitCode varchar(32) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end exec FastBusiness$Voucher$SalesInvoice$Item @unitCode, @voucherCode, 'ma_vt', @$ma_kh, @$ngay_lct, @$ma_tt, @$ma_nt, @ma_vt, @ma_kho, @so_luong, '', '', '', '', 0, @@userID, @@admin return end

if exists(select 1 from dmqddvt where dvt = @dvt and (ma_vt = @ma_vt or ma_vt = '*')) begin declare @unitCode varchar(32) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end exec FastBusiness$Voucher$SalesInvoice$Price @unitCode, @voucherCode, 'dvt', @$ma_kh, @$ngay_lct, @$ma_tt, @$ma_nt, @ma_vt, @ma_kho, @dvt, @so_luong, 0 return end

declare @unitCode varchar(32) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end if exists(select 1 from dmkho where ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_dvcs = @unitCode)&SiteCheck; begin exec FastBusiness$Voucher$SalesInvoice$Site @unitCode, @voucherCode, 'ma_kho', @$ma_kh, @$ngay_lct, @$ma_tt, @$ma_nt, @ma_vt, @ma_kho, @dvt, @so_luong, @he_so return end

declare @unitCode varchar(32) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end exec FastBusiness$Voucher$SalesInvoice$Price @unitCode, @voucherCode, 'so_luong', @$ma_kh, @$ngay_lct, @$ma_tt, @$ma_nt, @ma_vt, @ma_kho, @dvt, @so_luong, @he_so return
if exists(select 1 from dmthue where ma_thue = @ma_thue) begin select thue_suat from dmthue where ma_thue = @ma_thue return end else if @ma_thue = '' begin select 0 as thue_suat return end

query.text: select @@fieldExternal from @@prime$partition$current a left join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt where @@whereClause order by @@orderByClause
